title: good: core/error.rs actionable error types with expected vs actual
description: In error.rs:13-95, TooShort and BufferTooSmall carry expected vs actual sizes, making errors immediately actionable without hunting through code. This pattern is consistently used across all parsing modules.
close_reason: Verified: TooShort and BufferTooSmall error types in lichen-ipv6 carry expected vs actual sizes (TooShort.expected/actual, BufferTooSmall.need/have), making errors immediately actionable. Re-exported via lichen-core/src/error.rs.
